mapper.select: SELECT username, total_contributions, CAST(contributions_json AS CHAR) AS contributions_json, synced_at FROM github_contribution_snapshot WHERE snapshot_key = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO github_contribution_snapshot ( snapshot_key, username, total_contributions, contributions_json, synced_at ) VALUES ( 1, #{username}, #{totalContributions}, CAST(#{contributionsJson} AS JSON), UTC_TIMESTAMP(3) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE username = VALUES(username), total_contributions = VALUES(total_contributions), contributions_json = VALUES(contributions_json), synced_at = VALUES(synced_at)
